# anooptube.in

> Coding tutorials and developer content by Anoop P — software developer and educator based in Palakkad, Kerala, India. Topics: Python, C++, Java, Flutter, Android, PostgreSQL, Git, Linux, and Design Patterns.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://anooptube.in/): Latest posts and playlist overview
- [Blog](https://anooptube.in/blog/): All tutorial posts
- [About](https://anooptube.in/page/about/): Author background and credentials
- [Projects](https://anooptube.in/page/projects/): Open-source apps by Anoop P

## Tutorial Playlists

- [C++ Basics](https://anooptube.in/playlists/basics-of-cpp-development/): Fundamentals through advanced C++
- [Flutter](https://anooptube.in/playlists/flutter/): Cross-platform mobile development with Dart
- [Python](https://anooptube.in/playlists/python/): Scripting and application development
- [Design Patterns](https://anooptube.in/playlists/design-patterns/): Observer, Adapter, Prototype in C++
- [PostgreSQL](https://anooptube.in/playlists/postgresql/): Database CRUD with Python and Neon
- [Android](https://anooptube.in/playlists/android/): Native Android app development in Java
- [Linux](https://anooptube.in/playlists/linux/): Command-line tools, AWK, Ubuntu

## Author

- Name: Anoop P (ANOOP P)
- Role: Software Developer & Educator, Associate Software Developer at Kefas
